name: Orbit
description: Little moons gliding around pale rings — reseeding sends every satellite sweeping to a new point on its orbit.

code.style: --moon: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( /* the moon's transform-origin sits at the cell center, so rotating it glides it along the ring */ @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 13%; border: calc(28px / @Y) solid var(--color1); border-radius: 50%; opacity: @rand(0.35, 0.8); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 43.5%; top: 0.5%; @size: 13%; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--moon); transform-origin: 50% 380.8%; transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
